name: dianne-place-recovery-services
description: Dianne's Place Recovery Services public site, admin surfaces, and governed content automation.

scripts.build: npm run content:generate-backlog && npm run content:build-admin-manifest && npm run content:build-answers && npm run seo:build-sitemap && next build
scripts.validate:hard: npm run strategy:gate && npm run repo-work-os:audit && npm run validate:validation-registry && npm run strategy:validate && npm run validate:licensure-mode && npm run validate:content && npm run validate:legal && npm run validate:a11y-static && npm run validate:workflow-contract && npm run validate:admin-security && npm run validate:media-representation && npm run validate:aeo-seo-geo && npm run validate:blog-routes && npm run validate:admin-content-controls && npm run validate:repo-work-os-compliance && npm run validate:repo
scripts.validate:soft: npm run validate:dependency-lock && npm run validate:content-style-policy && npm run validate:future-content-self-heal
scripts.validate:all: npm run validate:hard && npm run validate:soft
scripts.validate:release: npm run content:generate-backlog && npm run content:build-admin-manifest && npm run content:build-answers && npm run seo:build-sitemap && npm run release:daily-proof && npm run release:self-heal && npm run validate:all
